---
title: "American City Business Journals"
page-layout: article
---

# American City Business Journals

## Description

Collection of local business news, company information, and economic reporting from major U.S. metropolitan areas. Useful for regional business, entrepreneurship, and economic development research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Government & International Statistics

## Access notes

Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-american-city-business-journals)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
